_doc: Formula-protected comp columns (Scott, 2026-06-20). The Work-Product Framework E2 chrome restyle (Dialysis src/comps_restyle.py) must NEVER overwrite these columns' values/formulas/number_format — restyle chrome only. Matching is by header-token containment, normalized upper (so 'INITIAL TERM' / 'TERM REM' match 'TERM').
